texto: What are you going to do to me?”“Tonight, I am going to seduce you. Next time, I am going to fuck you.”He smiles at me and pushes his back to the sofa leaving me sitting on top of him.“And why’s that?” I ask, a little bit surprised and shocked at the same time.“I’m the one who makes the rules so you have to do what you’re told.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Dora Sky que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “What are you going to do to me?”“Tonight, I am going to seduce you. Next time, I am going to fuck…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre educacao, delicious, ernest, com foco em boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
